docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $717.04 FILED BY RENT-A-CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT KING,JEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
